name: computer-use-windows
description: Control desktop apps on Windows from Codex through a local MCP server.

interface.longDescription: Windows Computer Use lets Codex inspect your desktop with screenshots and drive the mouse and keyboard through a local MCP server. It works on the interactive desktop only and cannot control elevated UAC prompts or the secure desktop.
defaultPrompt: Use Computer Use to inspect the current desktop and tell me what is on screen.
Use Computer Use to click through the current app and report what changed.
Use Computer Use to fill a form in the active window.
